(version 10.0.28000.1839) and is subject to the Microsoft Windows
Software Development Kit (SDK) End User License Agreement (EULA).

Redistribution of this file must comply with the terms of the
Windows SDK EULA.  You may obtain a copy of the Windows SDK EULA at:

  https://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?LinkId=13120000

Or install the Windows SDK and review the license terms included
in the installation.
